mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_COMMENT (CNO, PCNO, COMMENT_CONTENT, USER_NUM, BOARD_NUM, PID) VALUES(#{cno}, #{pcno}, #{commentContent}, #{userNum}, #{boardNum}, #{pid})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE CNO = #{cno} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CNO) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_NUM = #{boardNum}

SELECT ROWNUM, CNO, PCNO, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_REGISTER_DATE, USER_NUM, BOARD_NUM, PID, COMMENT_UPDATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM ( SELECT CNO, NVL(PCNO,CNO) PCNO, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_REGISTER_DATE, C.USER_NUM, BOARD_NUM, PID, COMMENT_UPDATE_DATE, USER_ID FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_COMMENT C ON BOARD_NUM = #{boardNum} AND U.USER_NUM = C.USER_NUM ORDER BY PCNO, CNO ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{criteria.endRow}
